subject: Re: Brian Webster: 410 S. Beach Road Jupiter Island, Florida
body:
brian ,, thanks for the info,, but I have no interst in Florida at the moment..

----- Original Message ----
From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
To: JE <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Tuesday, November 14, 2006 4:24:40 PM
Subject: Brian Webster: 410 S. Beach Road Jupiter Island, Florida



Jeff:

 

Property just came on the market owned by European Royalty.

House is 12,200 sq. ft. under air with 15,969 total sq. ft.

House is on the intracaostal side with 267 feet of frontage on 1.76 acres.

View is of the preserve across water.

Has dock and room for large yacht.

Property is heavily treed and very private.

 

Master is up with his and her baths & sitting room also adjoining office and billiard room.

Price is $17 million.

 

House has good bones and only need redecorating unlike 293 which needs major renovation.

See attached photos of exterior.

 

I can show it to you or your representatives at anytime.

 

Kind Regards,

Brian Webster

561-835-8350
